infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Agent ECHO listens ambiently to detect critical sounds, transcribe conversations, and alert you to what you may have missed.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Agent ECHO uses the camera for two-way ASL translation and to identify who is speaking in group settings.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Agent ECHO transcribes ambient audio so you can review what was said.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Agent ECHO uses your location to share it with your Trusted Circle during an emergency.
